//: Production posture for the Web host. In the cloud the AppHost runs the Web as Production, so this file applies. Base appsettings.json keeps RequireDatabase=false + Llm:OfflineFallback=true for the standalone Development run (no DB, no keys); production must NOT silently fall back to no-op repositories or canned LLM output — a missing connection string / API key should fail loudly rather than lose data or serve fake answers.
